releaseNotes: 0.2.0 — Karbon practice-management context. The foundation guard (quanto-client-context) now documents the karbon_* tool tier (client profile, work items, notes, note comments) as an optional, read-only context source for mapped clients. client-onboarding-review, document-lookup, flag-triage, management-report, and month-end-close gained conditional Karbon steps so they fold in client profile / engagement / relationship context when present. All additive and best-effort — skills skip Karbon silently when a client isn't mapped. 0.1.0 — Initial skill bundle: foundation client-context guard + 13 workflow skills (tier 1: month-end-close, flag-triage, balance-sheet-review, transaction-cleanup, client-onboarding-review; tier 2: ar-followup, ap-pay-run, vendor-cleanup, management-report; tier 3: year-end-1099-prep, catch-up-bookkeeping, journal-entry-assist, document-lookup). Bank rec, payroll, and sales tax intentionally excluded — see README.
